top_signals.title: Japanese garden designer wins silver-gilt medal at British flower show
top_signals.summary: "Tokonoma Garden" by garden designer Kazuyuki Ishihara was awarded the second-highest honor in the main Show Garden category and praised for its harmony and traditional beauty.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
